title: Short title
doc_html:
§1741.2. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Caller ID Anti- Spoofing Act".

            Acts 2009, No. 105, §1; Acts 2018, No. 652, §1.
doc_text:
§1741.2. Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Caller ID Anti- Spoofing Act".
Acts 2009, No. 105, §1; Acts 2018, No. 652, §1.
